risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Five-year claim history shows total of 31 claims across 2020-2024. Claim counts by year: 2020=2, 2021=9, 2022=6, 2023=3, 2024=11. One cancellation on record in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group. Loss ratio data was not provided for any year.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history spanning 2020-2024 across five carriers (EMPLOYERS Insurance Group, Chubb Limited, Zurich Insurance Group, Markel Corporation, and a 2024 carrier not yet named). Total premiums where available range from $580,805.53 to $630,843.20. A cancellation was recorded in 2022 under Zurich Insurance Group. Claim counts fluctuate significantly year over year: 2 (2020), 9 (2021), 6 (2022), 3 (2023), 11 (2024).
